# UX/UI Backlog

task: T-011
status: deferred beyond ux-journey-architect MVP

## Deferred Skill: conversion-retention-architect

Purpose:

- design subscription, Telegram/RSS follow, community join, contact, or trial flows without dark patterns.

Dependencies:

- journey map;
- privacy policy;
- analytics/event model if tracking is used.

Acceptance criteria:

- primary conversion path is tied to user intent;
- retention options are visible but not coercive;
- measurement events are privacy-aware;
- no fake urgency or fake social proof.

## Deferred Skill: ui-layout-validator

Purpose:

- verify rendered pages on desktop/mobile for layout, media, text overflow, accessibility, and first viewport quality.

Dependencies:

- browser automation skill;
- target URLs or local server;
- expected page roles.

Acceptance criteria:

- screenshots or browser evidence;
- checks media aspect ratio, overflow, font sizing, controls, focus, mobile nav;
- records viewport sizes and timestamps.

## Deferred Skill: onboarding-architect

Purpose:

- create start-here pages, new-reader routes, product tours, and help paths when a site needs explicit onboarding.

Dependencies:

- journey map;
- IA/SEO section model;
- content strategy.

Acceptance criteria:

- start path has one clear purpose;
- does not duplicate about/project/topic pages unnecessarily;
- supports SEO and LLM discovery without creating doorway pages.
